results.title: World Zoonoses Day observed at Tuensang District Hospital
results.description: DIMAPUR: World Zoonoses Day, observed annually on July 6 to mark Louis Pasteur’s successful administration of the first rabies vaccine in 1885, was commemorated at District Hospital Tuensang under the theme “Working Together: Preventing Zoonoses through Community Action.”The programme, organised by NOHP PCZ, Sentinel Surveillance Site, was held at the School of Nursing and attended [...] The post World Zoonoses Day observed at Tuensang District Hospital first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea

results.title: KIDNEY FAILURE REASONS
results.description: ਗੁਰਦੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਸਰੀਰ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਮਹੱਤਵਪੂਰਨ ਅੰਗ ਹਨ। ਜੇਕਰ ਕਿਸੇ ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਕੇ ਇਹ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨਾ ਬੰਦ ਕਰ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ, ਤਾਂ ਜਾਨਲੇਵਾ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।
